groups.theme: Sleep content and Sleepcast audio quality
example_reviews: The Sleepcasts are absolutely incredible. Nothing else has worked for my insomnia like this.
Sleep music selection is amazing but I wish there were more variety in the Sleepcasts.
The sleep sounds stop playing when my phone locks which completely defeats the purpose.

groups.theme: Meditation courses, streaks, and session tracking
example_reviews: Andy voice is soothing but after two years of using Headspace I am bored of it.
Meditation streak feature is motivating but I lost my 47-day streak due to a server error.
I completed every course in the library and now feel like I have outgrown the app.

groups.theme: Subscription pricing, billing, and plan value
example_reviews: The annual subscription at 69.99 works out to under 6 dollars a month which is reasonable.
Family plan covers 6 members at a reasonable price. Got my whole household meditating.
Worth every penny of the annual subscription. The mental health value of consistent meditation is impossible to put a price on.

groups.theme: App crashes, offline failures, and Android compatibility
example_reviews: Cast to Chromecast feature never works properly. Audio stutters constantly when casting to my TV speakers.
Push notifications arrive hours late or not at all. My daily meditation reminder is set for 7am but it arrives at 2pm.
There is no landscape mode support on tablets. Using Headspace on my Tab S9 in landscape is impossible.
I meditate in Spanish but the Headspace Spanish language library is a fraction of the English content.
I have been a subscriber for three years and the content library has not grown significantly in the last 18 months.
The beginner and advanced content are clearly differentiated but the intermediate zone is underdeveloped.
